produnto-desc: Package manager for on-wiki software development
produnto-fetch-server-error: Fetch failed due to a server error: $1 $2
produnto-fetch-connect-error: Fetch failed due to a server error: $1
produnto-fetch-no-manifest: The package did not contain a manifest file.
produnto-fetch-module-missing: The package manifest refers to a module "$1" with path "$2", but no such path exists.
produnto-update-invalid: Can't save packages page: not a valid package list
produnto-update-fetching-package: Package $1 $2 has not yet been fetched from the server.
produnto-update-failed-package: Fetching of package $1 $2 failed, so the package can't be deployed.
produnto-update-module-conflict: The module "$2" is present in package "$1" but already exists in package "$2"
produnto-sandbox-preview-warning: This preview used a package from your local working copy. It might not look the same when saved.
produnto-javascript-required: JavaScript is required to use this page.
produnto-sandbox-notify-login: The upload tool logged in successfully.
produnto-viewer-no-readme: Add a README.wiki file to make a description appear here.
produnto-viewer-too-large: The file can't be shown here because its size is $1, which exceeds the maximum of $2.
produnto-viewer-binary: The file is not a text file, so can't be shown here.
produnto-viewer-package-info: This file is from the package $1.
produnto-viewer-edit-denied: This page can't be edited on the wiki. Upload and deploy a new package version to make content appear here.
